label: Echo Relay Temple
description: A single player swaps between fire and water partners, using fading bridge memory, an inactive aura crystal, and a replay ghost to solve one chained elemental temple.

label: Relay Glyph Temple
description: A single-player elemental puzzle room where the inactive body powers a crystal bridge and each swap leaves a ghost replay that briefly opens a second route.

label: Relay Echo Temple
description: A dual-avatar temple puzzle where you park one body in an aura, swap to spawn collision-meaningful memory ghosts, and use a gravity-imprinted replay to unlock the final exits.

label: Memory Relay
description: A single-room Fireboy-and-Watergirl-inspired platform puzzle where parked bodies, replay ghosts, and gravity-imprinted memories form a readable living circuit.
